title: Index of Misremembered Rooms
hypothesis: Index of Misremembered Rooms tests whether archive loss can be felt through irreversible filing decisions instead of decorative particles.
dataModel: variable room cells connected to missing record paths and witness labels; mutation:route-rewrite
recordCountStrategy: seeded variable 13-24 records with no constant-size record array
interactionModel: drag across rooms to redraw the path; nearby labels change rooms and persist recovered route; mutation mode route-rewrite
stateModel: localStorage stores recovered, locked, and misfiled record ids for this draft id
visualLanguage: floorplan-like archive map with sparse labels and hard angular paths
expectedStructuralChange: Interaction must change at least one record position, class, label, count, and persisted state.
